titleStmt.title: SII 39.119: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 119. (A.R. No. 119 of 1916.) ETTIYĀTTALI, ARANTANGI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. AGASTYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE SAME SHRINE •••••••••• ŚAKA 1365 (1443 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of Kāniyāṭchi right of certain fields in the village of Māṅguḍi in Vaḍaveḷḷāru alias Sundarapāṇḍya vaḷanāḍu to Nāyaṉār Ilakkaṇadaṇḍaṇāyaka-Toṇḍaimāṉār son of Aḻagiya Maṇavālapperumāḷ-Toṇḍaimānār, who was the chief of Arantāṅgi for performing certain services in the temple of Tiruvagattīśvaramuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
satyam
cakāttam 1000 3 100 6 10 5 ṉmeṟ cellā niṉṟa Utiroṟkāri varuṣam paṅkūṉi mātam 8 § Aṟantāṅki Aracu Uṭaiyār
Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉār makaṉār nayiṉār Ilakkaṇa daṇṭaṇāyakka toṇṭaimāṉāṟku vaṭaveḷ
ḷāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu māṅkuṭi vayalil Eṭṭiṉakkoṭṭai tiruvakatti Āvuṭaiyāṉ vyakoṇṭa colai �
rūpāy 10 māṅkuṭi paṟai Uyyāṉ vyakoṇṭa tiruvakatti 2 10 rūpāy 9(1/4) Āka rūpāy Orumā 9(1/4) Iṉṉilattukku varum kaṭamai Iṟaiyiliyāka kaḻi
ttu kuṭuttu veṭṭimuṭṭi Iṉiyokam mākkalamum kaḻittu nayiṉār tiruvakatticura muṭaiyāṟku māttāl Añcumarakkāl poṉ kuṭu
kka kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Iṉṉilamum pāṇṭipperumāḷuṭṭār vyakoṇṭa yiñ cūṟaṇiṭṭa cantirātittavaraikku kāṇiāṭci Āka
kuṭutta Aḷavukku Itukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavaṉ gaṅkaikaraiyiṟ kapilaiyum brahmaṇaraiyum koṉṟa pāvattai peṟakkaṭavarākavum
Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyavar Aruḷicceyaṟpaṭikku nirampavaḻakiyāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
